message:
test(frankenterm-core): add scroll region, wrap, and erase fixtures

Add 5 new conformance fixtures: 3 scroll region tests (SU/SD within
DECSTBM region + newline-triggered scroll), pending wrap test, and
ED above (CSI 1 J). Total corpus now 31 fixtures across 8 categories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+{
+  "name": "pending_wrap",
+  "description": "Printing at last column sets pending wrap; next char wraps to next line",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "414243444558",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDE fills row 0 (cols 0-4). After E at col 4, pending wrap is set. Print X wraps to (1,0) then writes X. Cursor at (1,1).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "X" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "newline_at_region_bottom",
+  "description": "Newline at bottom of scroll region scrolls region up, preserving rows outside",
+  "initial_size": [5, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "411b5b324842 1b5b334843 1b5b344844 1b5b354845 1b5b323b3472 1b5b343b31480d0a58",
+  "comment": "Row 0: A, Row 1: B, Row 2: C, Row 3: D, Row 4: E. Set scroll region 2;4 (rows 1-3 0-based). CUP(4,1) to (3,0) at bottom of region, CR+LF triggers scroll: C→row1, D→row2, row3 blank. Print X at (3,0).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 3, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 0, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 4, "col": 0, "char": "E" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "set_region_scroll_down",
+  "description": "DECSTBM sets scroll region; SD scrolls only within region",
+  "initial_size": [5, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "411b5b324842 1b5b334843 1b5b344844 1b5b354845 1b5b323b3472 1b5b3154 1b5b313b314858",
+  "comment": "Row 0: A, Row 1: B, Row 2: C, Row 3: D, Row 4: E. Set scroll region 2;4 (rows 1-3 0-based). SD(1) scrolls region down: row1 blank, B→row2, C→row3. D falls off region. Row 0 (A) and Row 4 (E) untouched. Then CUP(1,1) print X at (0,0).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 0, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 4, "col": 0, "char": "E" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "set_region_scroll_up",
+  "description": "DECSTBM sets scroll region; SU scrolls only within region",
+  "initial_size": [5, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "411b5b324842 1b5b334843 1b5b344844 1b5b354845 1b5b323b3472 1b5b3153 1b5b313b314858",
+  "comment": "Row 0: A, Row 1: B, Row 2: C, Row 3: D, Row 4: E. Set scroll region 2;4 (rows 1-3 0-based). SU(1) scrolls region: C→row1, D→row2, row3 blank. Row 0 (A) and Row 4 (E) untouched. Then CUP(1,1) print X at (0,0).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 4, "col": 0, "char": "E" }
+    ]
+  }
+}
